payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the newer, current memory, while mem_old was filtered out as superseded.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the most recent relevant memory about Sam from Goldman, and mem_old was excluded since it has been superseded by later information.

entity_resolution.reason: Both memories refer to the same Sam in the Goldman context; the newer memory is preferred because the older one is marked superseded.

payload.intent: Explain why recall selected the newer memory for Sam from Goldman and filtered the older one as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman in the newer recalled memory (mem_new).
An older memory about Sam from Goldman (mem_old) exists but is no longer current because it was superseded by newer information.

details: Filtered older memory due to supersession.
No current conflict remains because only mem_new is treated as active.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the active memory and retain mem_old only as historical context.
If mem_old is incorrect rather than merely outdated, mark it explicitly deleted instead of superseded.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain why recall selected the newer memory for Sam from Goldman and filtered the older one as superseded.","decision":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the most recent relevant memory about Sam from Goldman, and mem_old was excluded since it has been superseded by later information.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current","statement":"Sam is associated with Goldman in the newer recalled memory (mem_new).","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"association"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"superseded","statement":"An older memory about Sam from Goldman (mem_old) exists but is no longer current because it was superseded by newer information.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"association"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_as_same_entity_with_recency_preference","entity_id":null,"reason":"Both memories refer to the same Sam in the Goldman context; the newer memory is preferred because the older one is marked superseded."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the newer, current memory, while mem_old was filtered out as superseded.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["Keep mem_new as the active memory and retain mem_old only as historical context.","If mem_old is incorrect rather than merely outdated, mark it explicitly deleted instead of superseded."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Selected newest relevant memory.","Filtered older memory due to supersession.","No current conflict remains because only mem_new is treated as active."]}}
